section.heading: Prohibition relating to foreign entities of concern

content.p: None of the funds authorized to be appropriated to carry out this chapter may be provided to a foreign entity of concern.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: This chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle” and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title XCIX of div. H of Pub. L. 116–283, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.
